Vitamin D Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a vitamin D test? 
A vitamin D test measures the levels of vitamin D in your blood. Vitamin D helps your body absorb calcium to build healthy bones and teeth. It also helps keep your muscles, nerves, and immune system working normally. Having vitamin D deficiency (very low levels of vitamin D) can lead to bone disorders Â and other medical conditions.
